title: hieracium mattiroloanum subsp. mattiroloanum
intro: Hieracium mattiroloanum subsp. mattiroloanum, also known as Hieracium mattiroloanum, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Hieracium mattiroloanum subsp. mattiroloanum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies in the form of capsules, tinctures, and infusions.
